title: Night of the Dream Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Drake chases Zoltan through a world of dreams! 💤

q.en: How does Drake end up inside the Dream World in physical form?
q.zh: Drake 是如何以实体的形式进入梦境世界的？

options.en: He is pulled there in his real body while he is asleep
options.zh: 他在睡梦中被以真实的身体拉了进去

options.en: He flies there on Worm's back according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他骑着 Worm 飞了进去（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He walks through a magic door

explain.en: After falling asleep, Drake and Worm are drawn toward the Dream Gate and arrive in the Dream World as their real selves, not just as dreamers.
explain.zh: Drake 睡着后被拉向梦境之门，他和 Worm 以真实的自我（而非单纯的做梦者）进入了梦境世界。

options.en: Villagers from Greenshire according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 格林希尔村的村民（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The guardians of the Dream Gate

explain.en: Kishar is a Dragon Master and Mamu is the Dream Dragon; they were both born in the Dream World long ago and guard the gate.
explain.zh: Kishar 是训龙师，Mamu 是梦境龙；她们很久以前都诞生于梦境世界，负责守护那道门。

q.en: What can a person do after drinking from the Dream Fountain?
q.zh: 一个人喝下梦境之泉的水后，能够做到什么？

options.zh: 让自己的梦境变成现实

options.en: Learn to fly without wings according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 不用翅膀也能飞翔（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The Dream Fountain holds all the power of the Dream World; anyone who drinks from it can make their wildest dreams come true.
explain.zh: 梦境之泉蕴含着梦境世界的全部力量；任何人喝下泉水，都能让自己最狂野的梦想成真。

q.en: What special gift does Mamu give Worm so he can keep up with the flying dragons?
q.zh: 为了让 Worm 能跟上会飞的龙，Mamu 送了他什么特别的礼物？

options.en: Dream wings with soft brown feathers
options.zh: 长着柔软棕色羽毛的梦境之翼

options.en: A map of the Dream World according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一张梦境世界地图（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Mamu glows and grows Worm's tiny wings into large feathered dream wings so the Earth Dragon can fly through the Dream World.
explain.zh: Mamu 发光，让 Worm 的小翅膀长成羽翼丰满的梦境之翼，使地龙能在梦境世界中飞翔。

q.en: Which land of the Dream World is dangerous for Kishar and Mamu?
q.zh: 梦境世界的哪一片领地，对 Kishar 和 Mamu 来说很危险？

explain.en: The Land of the Lost is built from dreams of being unable to find home; its energy latches onto visitors, and Kishar and Mamu can get lost there for days.
explain.zh: 迷失之地源于'找不到回家路'的梦境，它的能量会缠住访客，Kishar 和 Mamu 曾在那里迷失好几天。

q.en: How does Llew help the group while they are in the Dream World?
q.zh: 在梦境世界中，Llew 是怎样帮助大家的？

options.en: He opens the Dream Gate for them according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他为大家打开了梦境之门（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He drinks from the Dream Fountain
options.zh: 他喝下了梦境之泉的水

options.en: He tricks Zoltan into going to the Land of the Lost
options.zh: 他把 Zoltan 骗去了迷失之地
他直接与 Zoltan 交战

explain.en: Llew, visiting in a dream, tells Zoltan to go to the Land of the Lost so the wizard will get stuck there until the Dragon Masters can find him.
explain.zh: Llew 以梦中之身出现，故意告诉 Zoltan 去迷失之地，好让巫师被困在那里，等训龙师们赶来。

q.en: What is Zoltan's plan after he drinks from the Dream Fountain?
q.zh: Zoltan 喝下梦境之泉后，他的计划是什么？

options.en: To become a Dream Dragon according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 变成一条梦境龙（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To transform into Maldred and free him from the Naga
options.zh: 变成 Maldred，把他从那迦（Naga）手中救出

explain.en: Zoltan says he will use the fountain to transform into Maldred, gaining his strength so he can rescue the evil wizard from the Earthquake Dragon.
explain.zh: Zoltan 说他要借泉水变成 Maldred，获得其力量，从而把那位邪恶巫师从地震龙（Naga）手中救出。

q.en: What does Zoltan actually turn into when he drinks the fountain water?
q.zh: Zoltan 喝下泉水后，实际上变成了什么？

options.en: A Wizard Dragon with pink-and-orange scales
options.zh: 一条粉橙相间鳞片的巫师龙

options.en: Maldred himself according to some versions of the story
options.zh: Maldred 本人（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Instead of becoming Maldred, Zoltan's body grows into a dragon — a Wizard Dragon that can talk and mix wizard magic with dragon power.
explain.zh: Zoltan 没有变成 Maldred，而是长成了龙身——一条能说话、能将巫师魔法与龙之力结合的巫师龙。

q.en: How does Zoltan manage to escape the Dream World and return to the real world?
q.zh: Zoltan 是怎样逃出梦境世界、回到现实世界的？

options.en: Kishar lets him go on purpose
He attaches himself to Worm's energy using the spell 'Ibimys Simul'
options.zh: 他用咒语'Ibimys Simul'附在 Worm 的能量上一起离开

options.en: He flies straight through the open gate according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他直接从敞开的大门飞了出去（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Zoltan shouts 'Ibimys Simul' and clings to Worm's freezing energy, letting the Earth Dragon's escape pull him out of the Dream World too.
explain.zh: Zoltan 喊出'Ibimys Simul'，附在 Worm 的冰冻能量上，借地龙逃离梦境世界之力，一同回到了现实。

q.en: What does Kishar give Drake to undo the Dream Fountain's magic on Zoltan?
q.zh: 为了解除梦境之泉对 Zoltan 的魔法，Kishar 给了 Drake 什么？

options.en: The stolen Dream Orb according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 被偷走的梦境宝珠（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Kishar presses a blue quarter-moon amulet into Drake's hand; it will undo the fountain's magic and turn the Wizard Dragon back into a human.
explain.zh: Kishar 把一枚蓝色弦月护符塞进 Drake 手心；它能解除泉水魔法，把巫师龙变回人形。
